tagline: Date filter keyboard input: Fixed an issue where entering a date value via keyboard for relative date ranges failed to accept the input.
what_it_does: Date filter keyboard input: Fixed an issue where entering a date value via keyboard for relative date ranges failed to accept the input. Dashboard theme color palette: Fixed a bug where the visualization color palette was hidden when editing dashboard themes at the workspace level. Pivot table column width: The minimum width of pivot table columns is now 30px, reduced from 50px.
why_it_matters: Pivot table column width: The minimum width of pivot table columns is now 30px, reduced from 50px.
plain_summary: Date filter keyboard input: Fixed an issue where entering a date value via keyboard for relative date ranges failed to accept the input. Dashboard theme color palette: Fixed a bug where the visualization color palette was hidden when editing dashboard themes…
key_takeaway: Date filter keyboard input: Fixed an issue where entering a date value via keyboard for relative date ranges failed to accept the input.
